# Astrogram

Astrogram is a high-performance exposure card generator for astrophotographers built with Angular. It helps you create beautiful, Instagram-ready cards detailing your equipment, integration times, and session metadata.

## Core Features
- **Glassmorphism Design**: Minimalist and modern UI with neon accents.
- **Exposure Details**: Input integration times for L, Ha, OIII, SII, R, G, B filters.
- **Visualization**: Generates circular progress rings based on integration time.
- **Equipment & Software**: List your telescope, camera, mount, and software used.
- **Bortle Scale**: Gradient selector to indicate sky quality.
- **Customization**: Upload your own blurred background image and choose custom accent colors.
- **Export**: Download high-quality JPEG images directly from the app.
- **Plate Solving**: Upload an astrophoto and solve it against the Astrosolve backend to identify the exact sky region (RA/Dec) using WCS (World Coordinate System). The solver determines pixel-accurate sky coordinates for the entire image.
- **Annotation Overlay**: After a successful plate solve, overlays labeled circles on the image for named stars (Tycho-2), deep-sky objects (Messier, NGC, IC catalogs), and named nebulae. Circle sizes are derived from catalog angular diameters.
- **Annotation Filters**: Toggle visibility of named stars, HD catalog stars, Messier, NGC, IC objects, and nebulae independently. Filter stars by magnitude limit (0–15) using a slider.

## Tech Stack
- **Framework**: Angular (Standalone Components, Signals)
- **State Management**: Angular Signals
- **Styling**: TailwindCSS
- **Export**: modern-screenshot library
- **Plate Solving Backend**: Astrosolve — custom Node.js service wrapping the astrometry.net CLI tools
- **WCS Engine**: Custom TypeScript WCS projection (TAN/gnomonic) for sky-to-pixel and pixel-to-sky coordinate mapping

## Key Files
- `src/app/models/card-data.ts`: Data models and utility functions for card calculations.
- `src/app/components/card-preview/card-preview.ts`: Main preview component with export logic.
- `src/app/components/card-form/card-form.ts`: Form component for data entry.
- `src/app/components/card-form/annotation-controls.ts`: Plate solve upload trigger and annotation filter controls.
- `src/app/services/wcs.service.ts`: WCS projection engine for sky-to-pixel coordinate mapping.
- `src/app/services/astrosolve.service.ts`: HTTP client for the Astrosolve plate-solving backend.

## URL
- Repo: https://github.com/sidthesloth92/db-astro-suite
- Live: https://sidthesloth92.github.io/db-astro-suite/astrogram/
